body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

used ip address for ipv4 doesn't change it should still be selected from the range one two seven slash eight if there is also a suggestion to change the use the idea just for ipv4 please let us know next slide please so uh with the open issues and the resolutions why do we need to use vfd over internet over geneve instead of cfm over internet over geneve i think this is a remaining question there are three reasons for the answering this question from the authors number one in some scenarios using one om protocol is beneficial for example that can reduce the amount of code if we use both bftoip over genevieve and cfm over internet over geneve then different sets of codes is needed number two the authors assume that dc operators are unwilling to learn and operate to totally different oem mechanisms if they are going to deploy both ip service and ethernet service in their dc networks number three uh last but not least the authors are in favor of vfd much more than other oem mechanism i
